summary: The loop was exercised: bridge processed recipe commands, sandbox PNG saving succeeded, glm-ocr reviewed reference/candidate, and the review identified the native candidate as missing visible content.
not_final_reason: octane-preview.png is a saved native candidate but it is a flat blue frame, not an acceptable final multi-vase render.
next_iteration: Patch render-target/geometry visibility and camera framing, then re-render.
